title: World Border Timer
description: A client-side HUD mod that shows a clear world border timer in Minecraft. Displays a real-time countdown until the border finishes shrinking or reaches the player.
body:
# World Border Timer

World Border Timer is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds a readable on-screen world border countdown to Minecraft. It shows a clear timer for world border shrinking, including how long remains until the border reaches its final size or how long before a moving border reaches the player.

This mod is useful for border-shrinking survival servers, minigames, events, and competitive scenarios where precise timing matters.



## Features

- Automatically displays a HUD world border timer whenever the border is shrinking.
- Shows:
  - Time until the border finishes shrinking, if the player is inside the final safe size.
  - Time until the moving border reaches the player, if they are in its path.
- Simple JSON config for customizing position, formatting, and display style.
- Fully client-side. No server plugin or mod required.
- Works on any server that uses vanilla border mechanics.


## Installation

Requires [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). Install both, then place the mod jar in your mods folder.
